title: Regroup whole numbers
description: Regroup three-digit numbers as hundreds, tens or ones.
topic_path: Get ready for addition and subtraction

assessment_items.question_content:
**Write a number that makes this equation true.**

$3\text{ hundreds} =$ [[☃ numeric-input 1]] $\text{tens}$
hints: Let's use place value blocks to help us solve!

If we break apart one hundred into tens, we will see that $1\text{ hundred}= 10\text{ tens}$.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/b7f6b7caf40f5c88e02adfd48335b5e35cd8cc18)

Next, let's break apart each hundred until we have only tens.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/274718393eb0e241e5bf33160eb9b8ea072b7adb)

assessment_items.question_content:
**Write a number that makes this equation true.**

[[☃ numeric-input 1]] $\text{ hundreds} = 50\text{ tens}$
hints: Let's use place value blocks to help us solve!

If we group the tens into a hundred, we will see that $10\text{ tens}= 1\text{ hundred}$.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/4ffd06e1170056e4056fe40f53d148b0fef2c8f9)

Next, let's put the tens into groups of ten until we have only hundreds.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/3ea64cc4a9cb49d824a03636996e901dfa22e8fa)
